code:
fn ones(_ d: Int) -> String
  match d
  when 0
    ""
  when 1
    "I"
  when 2
    "II"
  when 3
    "III"
  when 4
    "IV"
  when 5
    "V"
  when 6
    "VI"
  when 7
    "VII"
  when 8
    "VIII"
  when 9
    "IX"
  when _
    ""
  end
end

fn tens(_ d: Int) -> String
  match d
  when 0
    ""
  when 1
    "X"
  when 2
    "XX"
  when 3
    "XXX"
  when _
    ""
  end
end

fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  let t = n / 10
  let o = n % 10
  "#{tens(t)}#{ones(o)}"
end

println(to_roman(4))
println(to_roman(9))
println(to_roman(27))
println(to_roman(39))
